sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.52 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.21)

statement.latex: Let$L$be a finite non-abelian simple group, and let$D$be a conjugacy class of involutions in$L$. Consider the complete graph$$with vertex set$D$. Define an equivalence relation$$(graph coloring) on the set of edges as follows:$(a,b) (c,d)$if and only if$|ab| = |cd|$.
